subcodes.first_line: O esteemed and noble one! I shall never forget the memory of the days that have passed, when I delighted in our meeting and found pleasure in discourse [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفاضل الجلیل انی لازال لا انسی ذکری الایام التی سلفت و انا متلذذ باللقاء متمتع بحدیث
subcodes.subjects: @newspapers and the media; publications, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @praise and encouragement, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
